.github/workflows/test.yml.general_idea: Replace reusable workflow call with inline job definition to enable JDK version matrix testing.
.github/workflows/test.yml.after:
runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: [17, 20]

    steps:
    - name: Check-out
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

.github/workflows/test.yml.general_idea: Add JDK 20 to the test matrix to verify compatibility with newer Java versions.
Update Maven command to run up to integration tests explicitly.

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the build stage base image from Maven with JDK 11 to Maven with Eclipse Temurin JDK 22.
docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code is being migrated to Java 21/22, requiring a compatible JDK for compilation.

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the deployment stage base image from OpenJDK 14 to Eclipse Temurin JRE 22.
docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The compiled application requires a Java 21+ runtime environment to execute.

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace curl with wget in the health check command.
docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The new Alpine-based images may not include curl by default, or wget is preferred for minimal footprint.
docker/Dockerfile.before: HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --retries=5 --timeout=10s CMD curl --fail --silent localhost:8080/actuator/health | grep UP || exit 1
docker/Dockerfile.after: HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --retries=5 --timeout=10s CMD wget -T5 -qO- http://localhost:8080/actuator/health | grep UP || exit 1

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Add a non-root user for running the application to improve security.
docker/Dockerfile.after:
RUN addgroup -S runners && \
    adduser --disabled-password -S runner -G runners

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the build command from dependency:resolve to dependency:go-offline for better caching.
Change the working directory from /usr/src/app to /app.
Update the COPY command to only copy source code instead of the entire context.
Add batch mode flag to the Maven build command.
Create a logs directory and assign ownership to the runner user.
Define a volume for the logs directory.
Switch the container user to the non-root runner user.
Update the path in the COPY --from=build command to match the new workdir.
docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The build stage workdir changed from /usr/src/app to /app, so the artifact path must be updated.

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Convert the CMD instruction from shell form to exec form.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Restructure docker-compose.yml to use explicit networks (app, db, monitoring) instead of the default bridge network.
docker/docker-compose.yml.after:
services:
  association-db:
    ...
    networks:
      - db
networks:
  app:
  db:
  monitoring:

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Bind database and backend ports to localhost (127.0.0.1) to restrict external access.
Mount initial SQL schema file into the database container for initialization.
docker/docker-compose.yml.after:
volumes:
      # DB content
      - association-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      # Initial schemas
      - ./sql/create_schemas.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/create_schemas.sql

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Refactor backend environment variables to use an .env file and simplify inline configuration.
docker/docker-compose.yml.before:
environment:
            # JDBC
            - spring.datasource.url=jdbc:postgresql://association-db:5432/postgres
            - spring.datasource.username=postgres
            - spring.datasource.password=password
            - spring.profiles.active=development
            # CORS
            - cors.origins=http://localhost:4200
            # JWT
            - security.jwt.secret=...
            - security.jwt.validity=18000
docker/docker-compose.yml.after:
env_file:
      - .env
    environment:
      # Activates profile
      - spring.profiles.active=dev
      # Logs
      - logging.file.path=./logs
      # DB
      - spring.datasource.url=jdbc:postgresql://association-db:5432/postgres
      - spring.datasource.username=postgres
      - spring.datasource.password=password

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add persistent volume for application logs.
Add Prometheus service for metrics collection.
docker/docker-compose.yml.after:
prometheus:
    image: prom/prometheus:v2.53.1
    volumes:
      - ./prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:9090:9090"
    depends_on:
      association-backend:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - monitoring
      - app

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Promtail service for log aggregation.
docker/docker-compose.yml.after:
promtail:
    image: grafana/promtail:2.9.0
    command: -config.file=/etc/promtail/config.yaml
    depends_on:
      association-backend:
        condition: service_healthy
      loki:
        condition: service_healthy
    volumes:
      - ./promtail-config.yaml:/etc/promtail/config.yaml
      - association-logs:/logs
    networks:
      - monitoring
      - app

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add Loki service for log storage.
docker/docker-compose.yml.after:
loki:
    image: grafana/loki:2.9.0
    command: -config.file=/etc/loki/local-config.yaml
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:3100:3100"
    depends_on:
      association-backend:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: wget --quiet --tries=1 --output-document=- http://localhost:3100/ready | grep -q -w ready || exit 1
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 15s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 20s 
    networks:
      - monitoring
      - app

grafana:
    image: grafana/grafana:11.1.1
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:3000:3000"
    environment:
      - GF_AUTH_ANONYMOUS_ENABLED=true
      - GF_AUTH_ANONYMOUS_ORG_ROLE=Admin
    volumes:
      - ./grafana/datasource.yml:/etc/grafana/provisioning/datasources/datasource.yml
      - ./grafana/dashboard_provider.yml:/etc/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/dashboard_provider.yml
      - ./grafana/dashboards:/var/lib/grafana/dashboards
    networks:
      - monitoring

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add association-logs to the named volumes list.
Update database healthcheck to use correct user flag and remove unused database name argument.
Remove deprecated 'links' directive from backend service.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the compiler and build tools will target JDK 17, failing to utilize or enforce JDK 21 features and potentially causing incompatibility with JDK 21-specific dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the parent POM version to a newer release compatible with the target environment.
Rename the project artifact ID to reflect the new application name.
Update project metadata (name, description, URLs) to match the new application identity.
Update SCM and CI/CD URLs to point to the new repository name.
Update the distribution management repository URL to the new repository name.
Update Spring Boot version to a release compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Boot versions may not fully support JDK 21 or may have known incompatibilities; upgrading ensures runtime stability on the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Framework version to match the new Spring Boot release.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.4.x requires a compatible Spring Framework version; mismatched versions cause classpath conflicts or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Data version to match the new Spring Boot release.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.4.x requires a compatible Spring Data release train; mismatched versions cause dependency resolution failures or runtime incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the old Log4j SLF4J bridge with the new SLF4J 2.x compatible bridge.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old `log4j-slf4j-impl` is incompatible with SLF4J 2.x (required by newer Spring Boot/Log4j versions); using it causes `NoSuchMethodError` or classloading failures at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update SLF4J API version to 2.x to support the new logging bridge.
pom.xml.why_exists: The new `log4j-slf4j2-impl` requires SLF4J 2.x; using the older SLF4J 1.x API causes compilation errors or runtime `NoSuchMethodError`.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the JJWT dependencies as they are no longer used or replaced.
Remove the Apache Commons Collections dependency as it is no longer used.
Add Apache POI dependencies for Excel file handling.
Add Apache POI OOXML dependency for Excel file handling.
Add Commons Codec dependency for encoding/decoding utilities.
Add Jakarta Validation API dependency explicitly.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry dependency for metrics export.
Add Spring Boot Starter Mail dependency for email functionality.
Add Spring Boot Starter Thymeleaf dependency for templating.
Add Spring Boot Configuration Processor dependency for IDE support.
Add Caffeine cache dependency with exclusion of checker-qual.
Add custom framework validation dependency.
Add custom framework Spring WS starter dependency.
Add custom framework Spring WS Security starter dependency.
Add custom framework architecture tests dependency.
Add Testcontainers dependency for integration testing.
Add PostgreSQL Testcontainer dependency for integration testing.
Add ArchUnit dependency for architecture testing.
Add AssertJ dependency for fluent assertions in tests.
Remove the H2 database dependency in favor of Testcontainers.
Remove the JUnit Platform Runner dependency as it is no longer needed.
Remove the Build Helper Maven Plugin as it is no longer needed.
pom.xml.before:
<plugin>
            <!-- Build helper -->
            <!-- Adds the generated files to the Maven classpath -->
            <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
            <artifactId>build-helper-maven-plugin</artifactId>
            <executions>
               <execution>
                  <id>add-source</id>
                  <goals>
                     <goal>add-source</goal>
                  </goals>
                  <configuration>
                     <sources>
                        <!-- JPA meta-model -->
                        <source>${project.build.directory}/generated-sources/apt</source>
                     </sources>
                  </configuration>
               </execution>
            </executions>
         </plugin>

pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude logback-classic from Spring Boot Starter Validation to avoid logging conflicts.
Exclude commons-logging from Log4j JCL bridge to avoid logging conflicts.
Add test scope to Spring Security Test dependency.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Reorganized Liquibase changelog includes to reflect a new domain-driven structure (General, Association, Inventory, Security).
Reorganized Liquibase changelog includes to reflect a new domain-driven structure (General, Association, Inventory, Security).
Reorganized Liquibase changelog includes to reflect a new domain-driven structure (General, Association, Inventory, Security).
Reorganized Liquibase changelog includes to reflect a new domain-driven structure (General, Association, Inventory, Security).
Added new changelog includes for inventory and library modules.
Added new changelog includes for inventory and library modules.
Added new changelog includes for security and auth modules.
Added new changelog includes for security and auth modules.
Removed inline changeSet for initializing association sequences, likely moved to a separate changelog file or no longer needed.
Removed inline changeSet for initializing auth data (permissions, root user, sequences), likely moved to a separate changelog file.

src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.general_idea: Remove unused Properties block defining a filename variable that is no longer referenced in the configuration.
Enhance console logging pattern to include color highlighting for log levels and styled thread/class information.
src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.before: <PatternLayout pattern="%d{ISO8601} %highlight{%-5p}{FATAL=red blink, ERROR=red bold, WARN=yellow bold, INFO=green bold, DEBUG=cyan bold, TRACE=blue bold} [%style{%t}{bright,blue}] %style{%c{1.}.%M(%L)}{bright,yellow}: %m%n%throwable" />
src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.after: <PatternLayout pattern="%d{ISO8601} %highlight{%-5p}{FATAL=red blink, ERROR=red bold, WARN=yellow bold, INFO=green bold, DEBUG=cyan bold, TRACE=blue bold} [%style{%t}{bright,blue}] %style{%c{1.}.%M(%L)}{bright,yellow}: %m%n%throwable" />

src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.general_idea: Replace simple File appender with a RollingFile appender to support log rotation based on time and size.
src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.before:
<File name="file" fileName="${filename}">
         <PatternLayout pattern="%d{ISO8601} %highlight{%-5p}{FATAL=red blink, ERROR=red bold, WARN=yellow bold, INFO=green bold, DEBUG=cyan bold, TRACE=blue bold} [%style{%t}{bright,blue}] %style{%c{1.}.%M(%L)}{bright,yellow}: %m%n%throwable" />
      </File>
src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.after:
<RollingFile name="file"
            fileName="./logs/app.log"
            filePattern="./logs/$${date:yyyy-MM}/app-%d{-dd-MMMM-yyyy}-%i.log.gz">
         <PatternLayout pattern="%d{ISO8601} %-5p [%t] %c{1.}.%M(%L): %m%n%throwable" />
         <Policies>
            <!-- rollover on startup, daily and when the file reaches 10 MegaBytes -->
            <OnStartupTriggeringPolicy />
            <SizeBasedTriggeringPolicy size="10 MB" />
            <TimeBasedTriggeringPolicy />
         </Policies>
      </RollingFile>

src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.general_idea: Enable file logging for the application logger by adding a reference to the file appender.

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.general_idea: Update test SQL data to match the new database schema where fees are linked to transactions.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.why_exists: The old INSERT statement targets a table 'fees' and columns (member_id) that no longer exist or have changed in the new schema, causing a runtime SQL error (e.g., Table not found or Column not found) during test execution.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.before: INSERT INTO fees (id, member_id, date, paid) VALUES ...
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.after: INSERT INTO association.transactions ...; INSERT INTO association.fees (id, person_id, date, paid, transaction_id) VALUES ...

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.general_idea: Update test SQL data to reflect a schema change where fees are now linked to transactions via a foreign key.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.why_exists: The INSERT statement fails with a column count mismatch or missing column error because the 'fees' table schema was altered to include 'transaction_id' and likely renamed to 'association.fees'.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.before: INSERT INTO fees (id, member_id, date, paid) VALUES
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.after: INSERT INTO association.fees (id, person_id, date, paid, transaction_id) VALUES

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.general_idea: Add test data for the new 'association.transactions' table required by the updated fee model.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.why_exists: The foreign key constraint on 'fees.transaction_id' would fail if the referenced transaction records do not exist in the 'association.transactions' table.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.after: INSERT INTO association.transactions (id, index, description, amount, date) VALUES

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/multip.general_idea: Update test SQL data to reflect the new database schema where fees are linked to transactions and persons.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/multip.why_exists: The old INSERT statements target a 'fees' table with a 'member_id' column that no longer exists or has a different structure in the new schema, causing a runtime SQL error (e.g., 'Table not found' or 'Column not found') when tests execute.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/multip.after:
INSERT INTO association.transactions (id, index, description, amount, date) VALUES
   (1, 10, 'Transaction', 2, '2020-02-01'),
   (2, 20, 'Transaction', 2, '2020-02-01'),
   (3, 30, 'Transaction', 2, '2020-02-01'),
   (4, 40, 'Transaction', 2, '2020-02-01');

INSERT INTO association.fees (id, person_id, date, paid, transaction_id) VALUES
   (1, 1, '2020-02-01', true, 1),
   (2, 2, '2020-03-01', true, 2),
   (3, 3, '2020-04-01', true, 3),
   (4, 4, '2020-05-01', true, 4),
   (5, 5, '2020-06-01', false, null);
